title: cyclosorus polyotis
intro: Cyclosorus polyotis, also known as the Chinese water fern or polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to promote digestion, reduce inflammation, and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cyclosorus polyotis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve liver function, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused into a medicinal soup, with some practitioners also using it in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
